description_long: This storage locker complex consists of two main black-and-white striped rectangular units positioned parallel to each other, separated by a central walkway. Adjacent to these, a large blue section features a grid-like pattern, likely representing individual locker compartments. The base is a textured, patterned platform that visually separates the locker area from the surrounding space. The black-and-white units appear to have access doors and possible ventilation slits, while the blue section is composed of smaller, modular compartments. The overall structure is robust and industrial, suitable for secure storage in a public or semi-public environment. The design suggests durability and high capacity, with clear separation between different storage areas.
description: A robust, industrial storage locker complex with two large black-and-white striped units and a modular blue compartment section on a patterned base. The structure is secure, high-capacity, and visually distinct.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two main black-and-white locker units and the blue modular section on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the black-and-white units and the full extent of the blue compartment section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the black-and-white units and the blue section now at the far end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the blue modular section on the right and the black-and-white units on the left.
